seo.title: Pet Boarding Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your pet boarding facility. Route upset owners to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Pet Boarding
hero.subheading: Pickup day is emotional. ReviewFlo asks after tails wag and leashes clip, while relief is still high.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Pet Boarding Business Faces

items.heading: Happy reunions do not mean Google opens
items.body: Owners just want to get home.

items.heading: Coughs and scrapes become public crises
items.body: Kennel cough fears show up as angry stars.

items.heading: Front desk rush at holidays
items.body: Nobody has time to coach reviews during check-in chaos.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Pet Boarding Facilities

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

benefits.sectionHeading: Why Pet Boarding Facilities Choose ReviewFlo

items.heading: Send after pickup
items.body: Catch owners when pups look healthy and tired.

items.heading: Private first for injury or illness notes
items.body: Serious issues deserve a direct line.

items.heading: Works for daycare and overnight
items.body: Same link for different stay types.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, especially after long trips where they trusted you with family.
Private feedback helps if someone feels turned away unfairly.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?

items.a: Reviews can mention peace of mind without promising video quality.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Pet Boarding Reviews Today
